instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to standards such as SysML [17] for Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE), ACME [23], AADL [24], MontiArc [25, 26], and SysML IBDs [17, 27] as Architecture Description Languages (ADLs) for component-based modeling.
